phase_name: WuciOS v2.4 Euclid Trial Phase 3C-D — Yocto Layer/Recipe Preparation
direct_rootfs_assumptions_insufficient_b: Yocto image construction is metadata, recipe, layer, machine, and distro configuration driven
BitBake task graphs are not direct package-manager rootfs operations
Yocto build outputs require separate source, layer, cache, and evidence policy
store_root_assumptions_insufficient_beca: Yocto does not use a Nix or Guix declarative store-root model
Yocto preparation requires layer and recipe policy rather than store realization policy
Yocto build-environment initialization is a distinct forbidden boundary in Phase 3C-D
allowed_l2_actions: generate non-artifact scaffold files under build/wucios
generate future command manifests as non-executable policy artifacts
do not run BitBake or initialize a Yocto build environment
do not download, clone, build, generate rootfs, generate images, or score anything
forbidden_actions: git clone for Yocto, Poky, OpenEmbedded, BSP, or layer acquisition
curl or wget for Yocto source, layer, SDK, toolchain, mirror, or image download
objectives: Define controlled Yocto layer and recipe preparation rules.
Separate Yocto metadata preparation from direct-rootfs and store-root assumptions.
Define future L3 evidence requirements without executing them.
Generate optional non-artifact scaffolding only when explicitly authorized.
